name: @by-lua/lspec-pi
description_en: L-Spec PI — Spec-Driven Development pipeline para PI.dev. Pipeline SEQUENCIAL: Discovery → Research → [Discuss?] → Specify → [Clarify?] → [Design?] → Tasks → Execute. Com Compliance Gate bloqueante e autosave obrigatório.
description_zh: L-Spec PI — 适用于 PI.dev 的规范驱动开发流水线。流水线 SEQUENCIAL：发现 → 研究 → [讨论？] → 规范 → [澄清？] → [设计？] → 任务 → 执行。包含阻塞的合规门和自动保存。
